summary: Candidate EXP for filling user-selected PowerPoint templates with compressed outline content and validating the deck through real PowerPoint visual QA.

context.task_family: Generic PowerPoint template filling, layout, and visual QA
output_focus: outline compression for low-density presentation slides
fallback text boxes when placeholders are absent

scope_limits: This is a generic candidate workflow, not a stable PowerPoint skill yet.
Do not accept structure-only validation for PowerPoint deliverables.
Do not overwrite an output deck currently open in PowerPoint; create a new version.
Do not assume python-pptx placeholders map cleanly to every template layout.
